openFindings.title: Catalog count and snippet-section claims are stale against the shipped catalog
openFindings.summary: The packet still says 18 per-feature catalog files follow a 4-section snippet contract, while the current root catalog describes 42 features across 8 groups and a sampled feature file has a table of contents plus five numbered sections.

openFindings.title: Implementation summary keeps a stale validator-warning limitation
openFindings.summary: The current strict validation run passed with 0 errors and 0 warnings, but the implementation summary still records remaining validator warnings.

openFindings.title: ADR-002 preserves the pre-Phase-027 catalog model
openFindings.summary: The decision history still records the old 18-file catalog decision and does not explain the later expansion to the 42-feature catalog.
